A decade ago in Korea, AlphaGo showed AI’s potential.

Together with the Korean government, we’re now looking at how this technology can help accelerate scientific discovery and create new opportunities for economic growth across the region. 🇰🇷

people_highlights.name: François Chollet
people_highlights.post:
AI automates tasks, not jobs, and when a task gets cheaper, demand for the job grows. 

AI cannot automate jobs end-to-end because it lacks autonomy and cannot operate without supervision. There is still zero job from 2022 that can be performed end-to-end by AI, not even
people_highlights.why: Recent post from Keras creator at Google

trending_posts.post:
yesterday's release of @karpathy's LLM Wiki system was a huge hit, but folks rightfully wanted to be able to chat with *any* folder, not just a "wiki"...and now that's possible!
